title: STAR - UMBC RAG Podcast Capstone
content:
Project: UMBC RAG-Powered Podcast Generation Capstone

Situation:
- Need to transform long-form book documents into coherent, voice-based outputs with contextual continuity.

Task:
- Design an end-to-end pipeline that combines OCR, retrieval context assembly, and audio generation.

Action:
- Built a retrieval-aware processing workflow for extracting and organizing source context.
- Applied OCR and orchestration tooling to prepare documents for downstream generation stages.
- Integrated generation pipeline components for multi-voice podcast-style output.
- Evaluated output quality and iteration points through applied experimentation.

Result:
- Source-reported high OCR and workflow quality in capstone delivery.
- Demonstrated practical RAG orchestration skills transferable to production GenAI systems.
